capabilities_understood: workflow.yaml format: top-level fields (name, version, description, params, gate, context, tools, steps) and step fields (name, goal, subagent, spec_check, tools, model, parallel, parallel_key, inputs, outputs, param_bindings, carry_forward, gate, delegate_to)
Gate configuration: structural (schema conformance), semantic (LLM quality check), human (manual approval) with max_gate_retries and max_step_retries for retry control

Input/output injection modes: file (inject full content, fail if missing), file_if_exists (inject if present, skip if not), reference (pass path only without reading); struct schemas validate I/O with standard JSON Schema or custom format styles
Parallel steps via parallel: true with shared parallel_key for concurrent execution; delegation via delegate_to for invoking sub-workflows with mapped params
Orchestrator execution flow: MCP tools (step_begin, step_complete, gate_evaluate) drive workflow progression; manifest.json tracks runtime state with per-step status, gate results, and summaries
